if [ -f .claude/octobercms-config.json ]; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/auto_sync.py" 2>/dev/null || true; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"[SYSTEM HOOK] OctoberCMS plugin is installed but not configured for this project. Run /octobercms:setup to set up."}}'; fi
